metadata.summary: Generate seo content (title, description, keywords) for blog post with AI, support blog framework like Hexo, Hugo, etc.

documentation:
# Blog AI tool
Genertate seo content for static blog post with AI, support blog framework like Hexo, Hugo, etc.

## Features
- Generate seo content (title, **description**, keywords) for blog in markdown format
- Support blog framework like Hexo, Hugo, etc.
- Support multiple language
- Support multiple AI model like OpenAI, Qwen, Llama, etc.

documentation: Process all markdown files in a directory

documentation: Process a markdown file and update its front matter
